      let anchorSlot;
      googletag.cmd.push(() => {
        anchorSlot = googletag.defineOutOfPageSlot(
          "/113951150/ciudad/seccion/zocalo", googletag.enums.OutOfPageFormat.BOTTOM_ANCHOR,
        );

          if("app-ads.txt") {
            anchorSlot.setTargeting("seccion", "app-ads.txt");
            anchorSlot.setTargeting("sitioseccion", "ciudad-app-ads.txt");

          if("") {
            anchorSlot.setTargeting("idnota", "");
          }
          googletag.pubads().enableSingleRequest();
          googletag.enableServices();
        }

  function setVw() {
    const vw = document.documentElement.clientWidth / 100;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--vw', vw+'px');
  }

  window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setVw);
  window.addEventListener('resize', setVw);
